description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat, multi-level roof and a striking combination of gray, orange, and brick textures. The front features a covered entryway with a path leading to the main door, flanked by tall, slender trees and a manicured lawn. Large glass windows dominate the facade, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The backyard includes a spacious wooden deck, a swimming pool with geometric lines, and outdoor seating shaded by tall palm trees. The property is bordered by low stone walls and lush landscaping, integrating the house seamlessly into its environment. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a harmonious blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, orange accents, and a backyard pool surrounded by lush landscaping and tall trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, orange vertical accents, and manicured greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, orange structural elements, and the start of the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, swimming pool, outdoor seating, and tall palm trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the backyard, pool, and stone retaining wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on the front and side facades
